text.div: CT CHEST WITHOUT CONTRAST. INDICATION: Cough x3 weeks, rule out mass. TECHNIQUE: 1.25mm axial slices. FINDINGS: No pulmonary nodules or masses. No pleural effusion. Mild bibasilar atelectasis. Heart size normal. No mediastinal lymphadenopathy. Incidental 3mm hepatic hypodensity — too small to characterize, likely cyst.

conclusion: No acute cardiopulmonary process. Mild bibasilar atelectasis. Incidental hepatic hypodensity, likely benign.
